hero_paragraph: Passionate about creating innovative and efficient solutions using modern technologies to solve complex problems. Committed to excellence and delivering high-quality results.
about_paragraph:
At 19 years old, I am a Computer Science student in the third semester, dedicated to software development and continuous technical improvement.

I graduated as an Internet Computing Technician from SENAI CIMATEC, where I earned a scholarship, strengthening my discipline and sense of responsibility.

My passion lies in web development and innovative technological solutions, always prioritizing best practices, clean code, and analytical thinking to build efficient and scalable applications.

I seek opportunities in Information Technology to contribute actively, learn from experts, and grow professionally by applying proactivity and dedication to every challenge.
project1_desc: Web application developed to demonstrate front-end and back-end skills, focusing on usability and performance.
project2_desc: Responsive system created with modern technologies, emphasizing intuitive design and API integration.
project3_desc: Personal project exploring new tools and frameworks, aiming for innovation and continuous learning.
skill_html_desc: Creating responsive layouts and modern styling with a focus on accessibility.
skill_js_desc: Developing interactive features and efficient DOM manipulation.
skill_react_desc: Building dynamic interfaces and reusable components.
skill_node_desc: Developing backend applications and robust APIs.
skill_git_desc: Version control and effective team collaboration.
contact_intro: Interested in collaboration opportunities? Let's talk!
certificate1_desc: Technical training in web development and digital technologies.
certificate2_desc: Advanced specialization in JavaScript and front-end development.
certificate3_desc: Deepening in React for building modern web applications.
